description: A tamer who raises herbivorous dinosaurs.\nOverwrites the same beasts to grow them ever stronger.
passive_description: Whenever the same herbivore card stacks on the field, the stack grows and evolves.

description: A tamer who commands both carnivorous and herbivorous dinosaurs.\nFuses kindred beasts into mightier apex forms.
passive_description: Fusing dinosaurs of the same species transforms them into a stronger evolution.
